title: Minky Velvet Lint & Hair Removing Clothes Brush, Reusable Velvet Lint Brush for Clothes and Furniture, Pet Hair Remover
features: PERFECT PET HAIR REMOVER ROLLER - The velvet material makes it a great lint rollers for pet hair. This lint roller for clothes even picks up the smallest pet hairs! Fab lint rollers for clothes
360 LINT BRUSH - Not only can this pet hair roller remove pet hair, but crumbs to. The velvet removes ingrained dust by penetrating hard-to-reach areas as the head moves for left and right handed use
VERSITLE BOBBLE REMOVER FOR CLOTHES - Our lint and fur remover isn't limited to just clothes, it can be used on many surfaces such sofas, curtains and many more! Great for getting crumbs of the sofa!
REUSABLE LINT ROLLER - No need to keep buying lint roller refills. Our pro lint remover can be used time and time again. This clothes brush for pet hair is a more sustainable alternative!
TRAVEL AND HOME GADGETS - Our Cat hair remover and dog hair remover is perfect for travel. Unlike traditional sticky roller for clothes, our brush doesn't stick to items in your bag! Handy gadgets!
description: Product Description Removes lint and hairs from garments and upholstery Button rotates head for left and right handed use Brush head size: 11 x 5 cm Total Size: 25 x 6 cm Box Contains Lint Brush
